description:
# Interface Extraction

Decouple all 82+ concrete FeatureLoader imports to use the FeatureStore interface. Wire via dependency injection in services.ts/wiring.ts. This unblocks M2 by ensuring AutomergeFeatureStore can be swapped in without touching consumers.

## Phases
1. FeatureLoader to FeatureStore Interface Migration
title: [Epic] Interface Extraction
